positive: An ultra-detailed, clean silhouette illustration of a magnificent golden retriever puppy playing in a stylized field of bioluminescent flowers. The puppy is the central focus, captured in a playful, dynamic pose, surrounded by gently glowing flora and soft, whimsical light beams. The style should be modern digital watercolor combined with linocut etching, emphasizing clean lines, bold color blocking, and high contrast. Composition must be centered and suitable for a repeating textile pattern or central chest print. Limited color palette of warm golds, deep blues, and emerald greens. Perfect for screen printing.
